title: Add unit tests for an untested shopping-cart module
instruction: The cart.ts module (addItem, removeItem, applyDiscount, total) has no tests. Write a thorough unit-test suite covering happy paths and edge cases: removing a missing item, quantity <= 0, stacking discounts, and empty-cart total. Do not modify cart.ts unless you find a genuine bug, in which case fix it and note it.

criteria.guidance: Are happy paths AND the listed edge cases all covered?
Do the assertions actually verify behavior (not just call it)?
